message:
🌱 Add oauth2-proxy: Option skip-provider-button provides white page with mission (#961)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oauth2-proxy-334-option-skip-provider-button-provides-white-page-with-found-link",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oauth2-proxy: Option skip-provider-button provides white page with \"Found.\" link",
+    "description": "Option skip-provider-button provides white page with \"Found.\" link. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oauth2-proxy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oauth2-proxy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nhelm list -n oauth2-proxy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oauth2-proxy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oauth2-proxy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oauth2-proxy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get configmap -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oauth2-proxy\n```\nWhen I use the parameter -skip-provider-button, the login button is not shown anymore, but a white page with a single link named \"Found\" instead."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Option skip-provider-button provides white page with…",
+        "description": "It's a simple workaround that wraps the original `http.Redirect' method.\n```yaml\noauth2:\n  image: oauth2_proxy # build from repository (armv6)\n  command:\n    - -cookie-domain=xxx\n    - -cookie-secure=true\n    - -cookie-secret=xxx\n    - -email-domain=*\n    - -http-address=0.0.0.0:4180\n    - -pass-access-token\n    - -provider=gitlab\n    - -gitlab-group=xxx\n    - -client-id=xxx\n    - -client-secret=xxx\n    - -set-authorization-header\n    - -set-xauthrequest\n    - -whitelist-domain=.${DOMAIN}\n    - -footer=-\n    - -banner=xxx\n    - -provider-display-name=me\n    - -skip-provider-button=true\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get events -n oauth2-proxy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Option skip-provider-button provides white page with…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "It's a simple workaround that wraps the original `http.Redirect' method.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "oauth2:\n  image: oauth2_proxy # build from repository (armv6)\n  command:\n    - -cookie-domain=xxx\n    - -cookie-secure=true\n    - -cookie-secret=xxx\n    - -email-domain=*\n    - -http-address=0.0.0.0:4180\n    - -pass-access-token\n    - -provider=gitlab\n    - -gitlab-group=xxx\n    - -client-id=xxx\n    - -client-secret=xxx\n    - -set-authorization-header\n    - -set-xauthrequest\n    - -whitelist-domain=.${DOMAIN}\n    - -footer=-\n    - -banner=xxx\n    - -provider-display-name=me\n    - -skip-provider-button=true",
+        "status:\n      - \"401-403\"\n    statusRewrites:\n      - \"401\": 302"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oauth2-proxy",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "oauth2-proxy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/issues/334",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/pull/2576"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 34,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with oauth2-proxy installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:40:00.453Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
+}
